name: rag-studio
description: Unified RAG Development Platform — Designer Mode + Autopilot Mode

scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -k -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=apps/web" "npm run dev:api"
